conclusion: PASS: route data, checkbox registry, balanced-only first-open state, canvas-safe direction arrows, road-geometry diagnostics, must-go/hotel artifacts, city-detail layers, collapsible/draggable panels, and route panes all validate. The map is now controlled by selectable route layers without PolyLineTextPath under canvas rendering.
root_cause_if_failures: If route CSV checks pass but checkbox/default/arrow/city-detail checks fail, the issue is code/rendering sanity in the map notebook or renderer, not the optimization math.

required_rendering_contract.default_route: Only traveler_balanced / Balanced full route is checked and visible on first open.
required_rendering_contract.trip_length_routes: 7, 9, and 12 day full routes must be registered and selectable, but unchecked by default.
required_rendering_contract.method_routes: hierarchical_gurobi_pipeline, hierarchical_greedy_baseline, and hierarchical_bandit_gurobi_repair must be registered and selectable, but unchecked by default.
required_rendering_contract.traveler_routes: relaxed, balanced, and explorer full-route overview layers must be registered; balanced is the only default-checked route.
required_rendering_contract.city_detail_routes: Balanced city/transition detail layers must be registered, directional, and unchecked by default.
